notes: Default Ex-0 heartbeat examples for SDK contract roundtrip tests.

valid_examples.name: heartbeat-ok
valid_examples.notes: Valid Ex-0 payload with the fixed metadata_or_heartbeat semantic.

valid_examples.name: heartbeat-degraded
valid_examples.notes: Valid Ex-0 heartbeat status payload using placeholder subsystem data.

invalid_examples.name: ingest-submitted-at-leak
invalid_examples.notes: Ingest metadata guard: submitted_at is owned by ingest and must not appear in producer payloads.

invalid_examples.name: missing-status
invalid_examples.notes: Producer-owned required field guard: Ex-0 requires status.

invalid_examples.name: unknown-ex-type
invalid_examples.notes: Unknown Ex type guard: Ex-9 is not a supported producer payload type.

invalid_examples.name: wrong-ex-type-for-heartbeat-shape
invalid_examples.notes: Ex type mismatch guard: heartbeat fields must not be declared as Ex-1.

invalid_examples.name: business-event-semantic
invalid_examples.notes: Ex-0 semantic guard: business_event is not the fixed metadata_or_heartbeat semantic.

invalid_examples.name: business-event-field
invalid_examples.notes: Ex-0 semantic guard: business_event is a non-heartbeat field.
